diagnostic.title: Biraawsarka lama taageero
diagnostic.description: Biraawsarkaagu ma taageero wicitaanada fiidiyowga. Fadlan koobi ka samee xiriirka hoose oo ku fur Chrome, Firefox, ama Safari.

closingScreen.thankYouForUsing: Waad ku mahadsan tahay isticmaalka codsiga isgaarsiinta {{branding}}.
closingScreen.doYouWantTo: Ma rabtaa inaad faallo ka tagto?

consultation.plsKeepThisOpenPage: Fadlan boggan ha furnaado, wadahadalka teleconsultation-ka ayaa bilaaban doona dhowr daqiiqo gudahood.
consultation.youAreNowInConsultation: Hadda waxaad kula jirtaa la-tashi taleefan
consultation.youAreInConsultation: Hadda waxaad ku jirtaa la-talin teleefan
consultation.audioCallRefused: Wicitaan maqal ah ayaa la diiday
consultation.audioCallRequested: Wicitaan maqal ah ayaa la codsaday
consultation.joinCall: Ku soo biir la-talinta teleefoonka ee socota
consultation.joinCallDescription: Baaqa wadatashigan ayaa horey u socday, ma rabtaa inaad ku biirto wicitaanka hadda?

login.translationRequestAccepted: Waad ku mahadsan tahay xaqiijinta, waxaad macluumaadka ku heli doontaa emayl dhawaan.
login.translationRequestRefused: Waad ku mahadsan tahay ra'yigaaga, waxaan daryeelaha u sheegi doonnaa maqnaanshaha.
login.homeIsAHUGTeleconsultation: {{branding}} waa nidaam la-talin teleefoon ah. Waxaad ku dhowdahay inaad ku biirto la-talin dhakhtar. Fadlan ha ka bixin boggan marka codsiga la-talinta uu socdo.
login.termsSecondText: ka hor inta aadan awoodin inaad isticmaasho {{sumcadda}}
login.theInvitationIsNotOrNoLongerValide: Xiriiriyahan martiqaadka hadda ma shaqeynayo ama horey ayaa loo isticmaalay. Dhakhtarka ama daryeelaha ayaa kuu soo diri doona martiqaad kale.
login.thisApplicationIsIntented: Codsigan waxaa loogu talagalay inuu ku shaqeeyo xiriiriye martiqaad ah oo lagu helo SMS ama iimayl. Guji xiriirkan ka hor si aad u furto la-tashi.
login.ifYouReceivedThisInvitation: Haddii aad heshay martiqaadkan, koobi oo ku dheji xiriirka la helay biraawsarkaaga ama halkan ku koobi furaha martiqaadka:
login.thisAppOnlyWorksByInivitation: Codsigan wuxuu ku shaqeeyaa oo keliya martiqaad. Fadlan isticmaal xiriirka taleefanka ee uu daryeelahaagu kuugu soo diray qoraal ama iimayl.
login.pleaseWaitWhileYourRequest: Fadlan sug inta codsigaaga la farsamaynayo.
login.theRemoteServerIsNotReachable: Server-ka lama heli karo, fadlan hubi xiriirkaaga
login.expertLoginTitle: Fadlan bixi macluumaadkaaga shakhsi ahaaneed ka hor intaadan ku biirin la-talinta taleefanka.

translatorForm.youAboutToJoinInviteWithPatientAndDOctor: {{branding}} waa nidaam la-talin teleefoon ah. Waxaad ku dhowdahay inaad aqbasho ballan online ah oo aad la yeelato bukaanka iyo daryeelaha.
translatorForm.pleaseFillYourInfo: Fadlan buuxi macluumaadka hoose si aan kula soo xiriirno si aan u helno la-talin taleefan.
translatorForm.name: Magaca hore iyo kan dambe
translatorForm.nameIsRequired: Fadlan geli magaca hore iyo kan dambe ee turjubaanka
translatorForm.emailIsInvalid: Qaabka iimaylku waa mid aan sax ahayn
translatorForm.directNumberIsRequired: Fadlan geli lambar taleefan oo toos ah
translatorForm.directNumberIsInvalid: Lambarku waa inuu ahaadaa qaabka caalamiga ah 00XX ama + XX

closeConsultation.youAreAboutTo:
Waxaad ku dhowdahay inaad joojiso codsiga la-tashiga. Haddii aad joojiso heerkan, waxaad waayi doontaa booskaaga safka waxaadna u baahan doontaa inaad dib u codsato la-tashi.


Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad joojiso?

test.yourDeviceSeems: Qalabkaagu wuxuu u muuqdaa inuu si fiican ula jaanqaadi karo nidaamka la-talinta taleefanka. Haddii muuqaalka muuqaalka uusan tayo ku filan lahayn ama uu jajaban yahay, fadlan hubi in calaamadda qalabkaagu ay ku filan tahay.
test.youCanStillJoin: Wali waad ku biiri kartaa la-talinta laakiin wicitaanka fiidiyowga/maqalka ayaa laga yaabaa inuu guuldareysto.
test.micDenied: Helitaanka kamarada waxay u muuqataa mid shaqeyneysa laakiin marin u helidda makarafoonka waa la diiday.
test.cameraDenied: Helitaanka makarafoonka waxay u muuqataa mid shaqeyneysa laakiin marin u helidda kamaradda waa la diiday.
test.bothDenied: Helitaanka kamarada iyo makarafoonka waa la diiday.
test.micAndCamRequesting: {{branding}} waxay u baahan tahay inay gasho kamaradaada iyo makarafoonkaaga si ay si sax ah u shaqeeyaan. Fadlan hubi inaad aqbasho codsiga ogolaanshaha.
test.permissionError: Waxaan la kulanay dhibaato ku saabsan marin u helidda kamaradaada ama makarafoonkaaga. Fadlan hubi in qalabku si habboon ugu xiran yahay.

videoRoom.needAccess: Waxaan u baahanahay marin u helidda makarafoonkaaga ama kamaradaada si aan u sii wadno wicitaanka.
videoRoom.cameraError: Khalad ayaa dhacay intii aad marin u heli lahayd kamaradaada.
videoRoom.microphoneError: Khalad ayaa dhacay markii la galayay makarafoonkaaga.

appComponent.whatsappBrowserDescription: Sifada wicitaanka laguma taageero biraawsarka WhatsApp-ka. Isticmaal liiska saddexda dhibcood ee ku yaal dhinaca sare ee midig oo dooro ikhtiyaarka "Fur Browser-ka", ama koobi oo ku dheji xiriirka adigoo isticmaalaya badhanka soo socda.
appComponent.urlCopied: Xiriiriyaha la koobiyeeyay! Ku dheji biraawsarkaaga.
appComponent.copyUrlManually: Fadlan koobi ka samee URL-kan oo ku fur biraawsarkaaga

authenticate.no_account: Akoon ma haysaa? Codso akoon halkan
authenticate.access_permits: Helitaankani wuxuu kuu oggolaanayaa inaad codsato la-tashi ku saabsan {{sumcadda}}.

register.by_checking_box: Markaad gujiso sanduuqa hubinta, waxaad aqbashay
register.own_account: Horey ma u leedahay akoon? Halkan soo gal
register.phone_required: Lambarka taleefanka ayaa loo baahan yahay
register.lastName_required: Magaca dambe ayaa loo baahan yahay
register.firstName_required: Magaca hore waa loo baahan yahay

profile.profileUpdated: Bogga si guul leh ayaa loo cusbooneysiiyay

dashboard.no_consultation: Wali ma lihid wax la-tashi ah. Adeegso badhanka hoose si aad u furto codsi la-tashi oo cusub.

request_consultation.request_form_title: Marka la soo gudbiyo, si toos ah ayaa laguugu wareejin doonaa codsiga la-tashiga. Waxaad awoodi doontaa inaad joojiso ilaa khabiir uu ka jawaabo codsiga.
request_consultation.expert_area_required: Goobta takhasus ayaa loo baahan yahay
request_consultation.patient_firstname_required: Magaca Hore ee Bukaanka ayaa loo baahan yahay
request_consultation.patient_lastname_required: Magaca dambe ee bukaanka ayaa loo baahan yahay
request_consultation.consultation_creation_failed: Ku guuldareystay sameynta la-tashi. Fadlan isku day mar kale.

common.connectionFailed: Xidhiidhka server-ku si fiican uma shaqeynayo, mana heli kartid codsiyo la-talin ah. Haddii dhibaatadu sii socoto, dib u cusbooneysii bogga.

acknowledgeInvite.subTitle: Waad ku mahadsan tahay qirashada martiqaadkan! Hadda waad tijaabin kartaa iswaafajinta biraawsarkaaga.
acknowledgeInvite.errorDescription: Xiriirintan qirashada hadda ma shaqaynayso ama hore ayaa loo isticmaalay.
